gitInfo.lastCommitMsg:
Phase 26: Layout Improvements & Flex Architecture - Content Readability Enhanced

- Restructure App.tsx with flex-based layout (column at root, flex row for sidebar+content)
- Update ResponsiveNavigationDrawer drawer height for flex parent (100% instead of calc)
- Fix content display on all breakpoints (no more cut-off right side)
- Implement proper scrolling behavior with overflow:auto
- Update version to 0.26.0 in package.json, App.tsx, ResponsiveNavigationDrawer
- Archive obsolete Phase-24 files and test artifacts
- Create RELEASE_NOTES_0.26.0.md with comprehensive changelog
- Update MANUAL-0.26.0.md and OPERATIONS_MANUAL.md with new version info
- Responsive design validated on desktop (1920x1080), tablet (768x1024), mobile (375x667)
